reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the active years for Spirit of the West and Big Pig.
2. Compare the durations and return the band with the longer active period.
original_final_question: Which band was active the longest, Spirit of the West or Big Pig? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Spirit of the West was active from 1983 to 2016, while Big Pig existed from 1985 to 1991, so Spirit of the West was active longer. -> Spirit of the West
Final answer: Spirit of the West
